steps.t: The Iron-folk can be found at Khur Azan. You have returned to Khur Azan and should now muster to the Iron-folk waiting in reserve.
Dáin can be found at Khur Azan. After arriving at Khur Azan, you have spotted your friend, Dáin. You should talk to Dáin.
Thromur can be found at Amdân. After repelling the Orcs at Kamaz-kala, you should find Thromur and investigate what kept him from joining the vanguard…
Dáin can be found at Durin's Stone. After the defeat of Urro One-hand, the Iron-folk have arrived at Durin's Stone. You should talk to Dáin.
